languages.text: "Well, then. Let us enjoy one more moment of leisure."

languages.text: "Nun gut. Dann genießen wir noch einen letzten Augenblick der Ruhe."

languages.text: «De acuerdo. Disfrutemos de otro momento de esparcimiento».
languages.original_text: "Well, then. Let us enjoy one more moment of leisure."

languages.text: 「ああ、それなら、もうひと時の余暇を楽しむことにしよう」
languages.original_text: "Well, then. Let us enjoy one more moment of leisure."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、それなら、もうひと時の余暇を楽しむことにしよう」

languages.text: “好吧，那就再来享受片刻的悠闲吧。”
languages.original_text: "Well, then. Let us enjoy one more moment of leisure."

traits.locale_text: “好吧，那就再来享受片刻的悠闲吧。”

languages.text: « Bon. Dans ce cas, profitons d'un dernier moment de détente. »
languages.original_text: "Well, then. Let us enjoy one more moment of leisure."

traits.locale_text: « Bon. Dans ce cas, profitons d'un dernier moment de détente. »

languages.text: "Pekâlâ o hâlde. Kafa dinleyeceğimiz bir etkinliğin daha keyfini çıkaralım."
languages.original_text: "Well, then. Let us enjoy one more moment of leisure."

traits.locale_text: "Pekâlâ o hâlde. Kafa dinleyeceğimiz bir etkinliğin daha keyfini çıkaralım."
